---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📱 Environment

**Frontend:**

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS, Ubuntu]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]

**Backend:**

- Node.js Version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- Database: [e.g. PostgreSQL 15]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 20.04]

**Application:**

- Frontend Version: [e.g. commit hash or version]
- Backend Version: [e.g. commit hash or version]
- Docker: [Yes/No, if yes include version]

## 🖼️ Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🚨 Error Logs

```
Paste any relevant error logs here
```

## 🔍 User Role

What role were you using when this bug occurred?

- [ ] SuperAdmin
- [ ] Panitia
- [ ] Juri
- [ ] Peserta
- [ ] Pelatih
- [ ] Guest/Not logged in

## ⚡ Priority

- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Affects some users
- [ ] High - Affects many users
- [ ] Critical - System breaking

## 📝 Possible Solution

If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.
